summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FairCheck AI bias detection platform. Backend APIs functional with bias analysis algorithms working correctly. Frontend UI fully functional with proper glassmorphism design, responsive layout, and all user flows working.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 500 instead of 400 for invalid CSV with missing required columns
minor_bugs.impact: Error handling could be improved but functionality works

passed_tests: Sample dataset endpoint (/api/sample-dataset) - 20 records with proper columns
CSV upload and analysis - fairness score calculation working
Homepage loading with correct dark theme (#0A0F1C)
Hero section with 'Get Started' and 'Try Demo' buttons
Navigation from homepage to analysis page
Sample dataset analysis via 'Use Sample Dataset' button
Try Demo button with automatic analysis trigger
CSV file upload functionality with drag & drop zone
Gender-based hiring analysis chart with Recharts
Income-based hiring analysis chart with proper data
Glassmorphism design with correct colors (#00F5FF primary, #7B61FF secondary)
Responsive layout on mobile and tablet devices

success_percentage.backend: 80% (4/5 tests passed - minor error handling issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Minor backend improvement: Fix error handling in /api/analyze-csv to return 400 instead of 500 for invalid CSV files with missing required columns. This is a low priority issue as the functionality works correctly.
